# Percentage Calculator
> A free, fast, no-signup online calculator for percentages, discounts, VAT, and sales tax.

This site provides simple, accurate math tools for everyday calculations. All tools work instantly in the browser with no backend required.

## Tools Available

- [Percentage Calculator](https://kabeersdev.github.io/percentage_calculator/index.html): Calculate what percentage of a number is, find what percent one number is of another, and compute percentage increase or decrease between two values.
- [Discount Calculator](https://kabeersdev.github.io/percentage_calculator/index.html#discount): Enter an original price and a discount percentage to find the final price, the discount amount, and how much you save.
- [VAT Calculator](https://kabeersdev.github.io/percentage_calculator/index.html#vat): Add or remove VAT for 18+ countries including UK (20%), Germany (19%), France (20%), UAE (5%), India GST (18%), Australia GST (10%). Works in both directions — net to gross and gross to net.
- [Sales Tax Calculator](https://kabeersdev.github.io/percentage_calculator/index.html#tax): All 50 US state sales tax rates included. Calculate tax-inclusive price from pre-tax amount or reverse-calculate the pre-tax price from a receipt total.
- [Blog](https://kabeersdev.github.io/percentage_calculator/blog.html): Articles and guides on percentages, discounts, VAT, and everyday math.

## Key Facts About This Site

- All calculations happen client-side in the browser — no data is sent to any server.
- The site is completely free with no registration, ads, or paywalls.
- VAT rates covered: UK, France, Germany, Italy, Spain, Poland, Sweden, Denmark, Finland, Ireland, Netherlands, Belgium, Greece, Austria, UAE, India, Australia, New Zealand.
- US sales tax rates covered: All 50 states.
- The site includes FAQ structured data and JSON-LD markup for rich search results.

## Formulas Used

- **Percentage of a number**: Result = (Percentage ÷ 100) × Number
- **What percentage**: Result = (Part ÷ Whole) × 100
- **Percentage change**: Result = ((New − Old) ÷ |Old|) × 100
- **Discount**: Savings = Original × (Discount% ÷ 100); Final = Original − Savings
- **VAT add**: Gross = Net × (1 + Rate ÷ 100)
- **VAT remove**: Net = Gross ÷ (1 + Rate ÷ 100)
- **Sales tax add**: Total = Pre-tax × (1 + Rate ÷ 100)
- **Sales tax remove**: Pre-tax = Total ÷ (1 + Rate ÷ 100)

## Sitemap

- https://kabeersdev.github.io/percentage_calculator/index.html — Main calculator
- https://kabeersdev.github.io/percentage_calculator/blog.html — Blog listing
- https://kabeersdev.github.io/percentage_calculator/post.html — Individual blog posts
